execute_steps: run PiTransport.test.ts: 'should spawn pi with correct args'
verify spawn called with ['--mode', 'rpc'] and stdio: ['pipe','pipe','pipe']
test_execution.evidence: vitest 33 passed — start() spawns with correct args

execute_steps: run PiTransport.test.ts: 'should emit error event on ENOENT'
verify error handler receives Error with message containing 'not found'
test_execution.evidence: vitest pass — ENOENT triggers 'Pi was not found on PATH' error

execute_steps: run PiTransport.test.ts: 'should write JSON to stdin'
verify stdin.write called with JSON.stringify({ type: 'prompt', message: 'hello' }) + newline
test_execution.evidence: vitest pass — send() writes valid JSONL to stdin

execute_steps: run PiTransport.test.ts: 'should parse valid JSONL from stdout and call handler'
simulate stdout data line with valid JSON, verify handler receives parsed object
test_execution.evidence: vitest pass — onEvent handler receives { type: 'message_update', ... }

execute_steps: run PiTransport.test.ts: 'should skip malformed JSON and not crash'
simulate stdout 'not-json\n', verify no crash and handler not called
test_execution.evidence: vitest pass — malformed JSON skipped, session continues

execute_steps: run PiTransport.test.ts: 'should send SIGTERM to the process'
call kill(), verify process.kill called with 'SIGTERM'
test_execution.evidence: vitest pass — kill() sends SIGTERM

execute_steps: run PiTransport.test.ts: 'should call handler when subprocess exits'
emit 'close' event with code=1, verify onClose handler called with (1, null)
emit 'close' with signal='SIGTERM', verify handler called with (null, 'SIGTERM')
test_execution.evidence: vitest pass — onClose fires with exit code and signal

execute_steps: run PiEventConverter.test.ts: text_delta conversion
verify convertPiEvent({ type: 'message_update', assistantMessageEvent: { type: 'text_delta', delta: 'hello' } }) returns [{ type: 'text', text: 'hello' }]
test_execution.evidence: vitest pass — text_delta → text AgentMessage

execute_steps: run PiEventConverter.test.ts: thinking_delta conversion
verify convertPiEvent with thinking_delta returns [{ type: 'reasoning', text: deltaValue, live: true }]
test_execution.evidence: vitest pass — thinking_delta → reasoning with live:true

execute_steps: run PiEventConverter.test.ts: tool_execution_start conversion
verify result has { type: 'tool_call', id: 'tc-1', name: 'read_file', input: {...}, status: 'in_progress' }
test_execution.evidence: vitest pass — tool_execution_start → tool_call with in_progress

execute_steps: run PiEventConverter.test.ts: tool_execution_end (success) → completed
run PiEventConverter.test.ts: tool_execution_end (error) → failed
test_execution.evidence: vitest pass — isError=false → completed, isError=true → failed

execute_steps: run PiEventConverter.test.ts: turn_end with usage
verify result length = 2: first is usage, second is turn_complete
test_execution.evidence: vitest pass — turn_end produces usage + turn_complete

execute_steps: run PiEventConverter.test.ts: agent_start/agent_end/response/turn_start/unknown
verify all return []
test_execution.evidence: vitest pass — unknown events return empty array

execute_steps: code_review: read PiTransport.ts L55-60 — ENOENT handler produces 'Pi was not found on PATH. Please install Pi and retry.'
code_review: read runPi.ts L65-73 — onError callback receives ENOENT error, calls lifecycle.markCrash + safeCleanup
verify error propagates to user via session lifecycle
test_execution.evidence: code review — ENOENT handled at transport level, propagates to runner and session lifecycle

execute_steps: grep 'pi' in shared/src/modes.ts — 'pi' in AGENT_FLAVORS array
grep PI_PERMISSION_MODES — ['default', 'yolo'] defined
grep 'pi' in shared/src/flavors.ts — pi in FLAVOR_CAPS (ModelChange), pi='Pi' in FLAVOR_LABELS
grep piCommand in cli/src/commands/registry.ts — registered
test_execution.evidence: grep verification — 'pi' present in all shared types and command registry

execute_steps: code_review: runPi.ts L29-38 — bootstrapSession({ flavor: 'pi', startedBy: 'terminal', workingDirectory, model })
code_review: runPi.ts L89-96 — onEvent handler: response events → handleResponse, others → convertPiEvent → session.sendAgentMessage
code_review: runPi.ts L163-168 — onUserMessage → formatMessageWithAttachments → transport.send({ type: 'prompt', message })
test_execution.evidence: code review — session bootstrapped with flavor='pi', user messages routed via transport.send prompt

execute_steps: code_review: runPi.ts L135-138 — registerAbortSessionHandler → transport.send({ type: 'abort' })
verify abort RPC sends abort command to Pi
test_execution.evidence: code review — abort handler sends { type: 'abort' } via transport

execute_steps: code_review: runPi.ts L143-159 — registerSessionConfigRpc onApply callback
verify onApply calls transport.send({ type: 'set_model', provider: '', modelId })
verify new_session + get_state commands also sent for reset
test_execution.evidence: code review — model switch sends set_model RPC via transport

execute_steps: code_review: runPi.ts L77-85 — onClose handler with code/signal
verify lifecycle.markCrash called, setExitCode(1), setArchiveReason, setSessionEndReason('error')
verify safeCleanup resolves lifecycle promise
test_execution.evidence: code review — Pi crash triggers markCrash + cleanupAndExit

execute_steps: code_review: runPi.ts L44-49 — lifecycle.onAfterClose callback → transport.kill()
verify SIGTERM to HAPI triggers transport.kill() which sends SIGTERM to Pi subprocess
test_execution.evidence: code review — HAPI exit triggers transport.kill() for Pi subprocess cleanup
